title: Sweet Red Roasted Malaysian Peppers Bowl
description: A silky and aromatic Malaysian-inspired dish featuring sweet red peppers, perfect for a lazy Sunday. Simply roasted to perfection and served in an earthenware bowl.

ingredients.name: fish sauce
ingredients.notes: use gluten-free fish sauce for a gluten-free variant

instructions: Peel and seed the red bell peppers, cut them into large chunks, and place in a bowl.
In a small bowl, whisk together coconut oil, garlic, shallots, fish sauce, honey, soy sauce, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the marinade over the bell peppers and toss to coat evenly.
Transfer the bell peppers to a 9x13 inch baking dish and roast in the preheated oven for 30-40 minutes, or until tender and caramelized.
Remove the bell peppers from the oven and sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds, if using.
Serve the roasted bell peppers in an earthenware bowl, garnished with additional sesame seeds and a drizzle of honey, if desired.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro, if desired.
